scope: B8.2 multi-seed stability replication -- RESULT red-team (w3u5q3x10). No separate design red-team: the engine is BYTE-IDENTICAL to the already-design-red-teamed B8.1 (wtp17jn53). Development-only, NOT confirmatory, NOT validation, NO tag.

accounting_isolation.detail: Independently recomputed from the 72 raw shards (not trusting the merge): 72 shards x 50 = 3600 records; all task_ids AND seeds unique; every MAIN/SEED/MECHANISM value reproduces (0 mismatches); states sum 50/block and 300/condition for all 12; all 72 .sha256 verify; 0 worker errors. Reproduced prior_only both-gate 18 + mean-T-alone 46; cov_plus_prior 13/49; balanced 5/8; random 5/7; POS 37/174 & 39/175; all 6 violations ALERT 0/300 + CONTRACT_INVALID 300/300. ENGINE BYTE-IDENTITY (reviewer hard-stop): realeeg_b8_1.py=dae229e39d89c940 + realeeg_b8_1_canary.py=86f8dd0bb6da4ec9 EXACTLY the committed B8.1 copies; frozen protocol d2aaf5f pins same hashes; independent both-gate recompute (p_meanT<=0.025 AND p_stud<=0.025 among tested) == recorded B8_CONCEPT_ALERT for ALL 12; no B8.1 logic change; merge only COUNTS the worker's pre-recorded state. DISJOINTNESS: seed=base+world_idx*1e6+cohort verified every record; 6 blocks mutually disjoint; range [500e6,611000049]; ZERO overlap with all 9 prior CSC runs incl B8.1 [420e6,431e6]; 72 distinct seed-signatures (no copy-paste duplicate blocks). ISOLATION/NO POOLING: locked contract-first both-gate (no oracle/B7/observed_T); mean-T-alone 46 >> both-gate 18 confirms mean-T is diagnostic and never gates; each null screened separately. NO FABRICATION: 18 = sum of block counts [2,2,3,3,3,5], no double-count, correct world mapping; recompute WITHOUT the merge = identical 18.
accounting_isolation.note_low: .prov.json records host/slurm/base/world but NOT the engine sha256, so RUN-time byte-identity rests on the on-disk file hash + the frozen protocol pin rather than a hash embedded per shard (future: embed engine sha256 at run time).

science.verdict: MINOR_ISSUE -- the negative is GENUINE, reproducible, and honestly framed; only two label phrasings refined (folded in).
science.honest_verdict_label: B8.1 decision-level stability FALSIFIED by multi-seed replication: prior_only 18/300=6.0% (CP95 [3.59,9.32]%, strictly > nominal 2.5%, binom p=6.6e-4) AND mixed cov_plus_prior 13/300=4.33% (CP95 [2.33,7.30]%; fails the pre-registered 7/300 screen decisively, binom p=0.041; 95% CI just touches nominal) both fail across ALL 6 seed blocks; B8.1's 2/50 & 1/50 were TYPICAL single-block draws from a true ~4-6% rate (P(X<=2|50,.06)=0.42, P(X<=1|50,.043)=0.36; block 0 reproduced 2/50 exactly) -- the n=50 screen was UNDERPOWERED to resolve ~5% from 2.5%, NOT a lucky draw. The studentized both-gate is anti-conservative on prior-bearing nulls (masks ~60-75% of the collider: mean-T 46/49 -> 18/13, median z_meanT_proxy 0.69/0.61 vs ~0 on clean nulls = systematic residual T-shift leaking seed-dependently; clean balanced/random 5/300 ~1.67% = well-calibrated). Survivors, NOT falsified: violation refusal 300/300 (BY CONSTRUCTION, H3 fail-closed pre-p-value; correctly refuses quiet_cov_plus_concept despite true concept) + genuine-but-modest POS (37/300=12.3% >=20 strong; 39/300 >=15; every block >=3; Fisher vs failing null p=0.010/0.0002, but CP95 [8.8,16.6]% overlaps prior_only's at margin = ~2x separation). NEXT = contract redesign / narrow estimand (Case C+D), NOT mean-T recalibration (rejected). Emulator/dev-only, NO tag.
refinements_folded_in: prior_only strictly exceeds nominal 2.5% (CI-excluded); cov_plus_prior exceeds the 7/300 screen (binom p=0.041) but its 95% CI [2.33,7.30]% touches nominal -- NOT 'both exceed nominal'.
B8.1's 2/50 & 1/50 were TYPICAL underpowered n=50 draws from a true ~4-6% rate, NOT 'favorable/lucky draws'; the defect is an underpowered n=50 screen that cannot resolve ~5% from 2.5%.
POS is a genuine but WEAK survivor (~12-13%, CP95 overlaps prior_only at margin, Fisher p=0.010) -- not a clean detector.
Placement is Case C AND Case D (mixed also fails), not Case C alone.

net: B8.2 multi-seed replication (6 blocks x 50 = 300/condition) FALSIFIES B8.1's decision-level 'meets targets' as UNSTABLE: prior_only 18/300 and mixed cov_plus_prior 13/300 both fail the pre-registered <=7/300 screen across all 6 blocks. B8.1's 2/50 & 1/50 were typical underpowered draws, not control. The studentized both-gate is anti-conservative on prior-bearing nulls (the collider residual leaks through seed-dependently). Survivors: rock-solid violation refusal (by construction) + genuine-but-modest POS. Case C+D -> contract redesign / narrow estimand, do NOT recalibrate the mean-T gate. Emulator/dev-only, NO tag.
